features: PREMIUM QUALITY PAPER BAGS: The white paper bags are made of strong and premium quality Kraft paper which will not tear under a heavy load and are 100% Recyclable.
DURABLE KRAFT PAPER BAGS: The twisted handle design adds a strength to the paper bags making them easy for customers to carry.
ECO-FRIENDLY PAPER BAGS: The recyclable bags are perfectly glued and has a rectangular solid bottom which makes it stand on its own and easy to load.
DIY PAPER GIFT BAGS: The plain kraft bags can be decorated easily with stickers, drawings or coloring for gifting your special ones or can put the logo of your business for the corporate events.

MULTIPURPOSE PAPER BAGS: These simple yet elegant paper bags are perfect for customized gift bags, shopping bag, gift wrapping, goodie bags for a wedding or parties and can also be used for corporate events also.
description: Replace the plastic bags with these elegant paper bags that are environment-friendly and can be reused easily. The paper bags are made of heavy quality Kraft paper with a rectangular bottom that won't tear under a heavy load and has twisted handles for easy carrying. The bags are perfect for welcome gifts, shopping bags, gift bags, bridesmaid bags, boutiques, corporate events, and parties. These gift bags can easily be personalized by adding a creative touch with stickers, stencils, painting, drawing, calligraphy and many others. You can also put your own logo on each bag to make it as the shopping bags of your store. Features: Twisted Handle feature Fully Recyclable Multiple Uses High tear resistance Lightweight Easy to carry Specifications: Material: Kraft paper Color: White Size: 18 cm x 22 cm x 8 cm Type: Paper Shopping Bag Handle: Twisted Handle Pattern: Plain Recyclable: Yes
